---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or capability
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: feature-request
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Be specific.

## Evidence

What proves this problem exists for real users?
(User feedback, observed behaviour, data, error logs, competitor analysis)

## Proposed Solution

What should change? Be concrete about which pages, flows, or data are affected.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were evaluated? Why were they rejected?

## User Value

Who benefits and how? Quantify if possible.

## Estimated Complexity

- [ ] Small (< 1 day)
- [ ] Medium (1–3 days)
- [ ] Large (1–2 weeks)
- [ ] Very Large (requires RFC)

## Charter Check

- [ ] Does not require monetization
- [ ] Does not add fake activity
- [ ] Evidence exists for this problem
- [ ] Mobile-compatible approach

---

> All features require an RFC in `docs/07_RFC/` before implementation begins.  
> See `docs/00_GOVERNANCE/CHANGE_REQUEST_TEMPLATE.md`.
